{"credits": [{"type": "reporter", "user": {"avatar_url": "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/230947535?v=4", "events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/r3d5t0x3/events{/privacy}", "followers_url": "https://api.github.com/users/r3d5t0x3/followers", "following_url": "https://api.github.com/users/r3d5t0x3/following{/other_user}", "gists_url": "https://api.github.com/users/r3d5t0x3/gists{/gist_id}", "gravatar_id": "", "html_url": "https://github.com/r3d5t0x3", "id": 230947535, "login": "r3d5t0x3", "node_id": "U_kgDODcP6zw", "organizations_url": "https://api.github.com/users/r3d5t0x3/orgs", "received_events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/r3d5t0x3/received_events", "repos_url": "https://api.github.com/users/r3d5t0x3/repos", "site_admin": false, "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/r3d5t0x3/starred{/owner}{/repo}", "subscriptions_url": "https://api.github.com/users/r3d5t0x3/subscriptions", "type": "User", "url": "https://api.github.com/users/r3d5t0x3", "user_view_type": "public"}}], "cve_id": null, "cvss": {"score": 7.5, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:N/UI:N/S:U/C:N/I:N/A:H"}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 7.5, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:N/UI:N/S:U/C:N/I:N/A:H"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-476", "name": "NULL Pointer Dereference"}], "description": "## Summary

A NULL pointer dereference vulnerability exists in `PDFParser::CreateFilterForStream()` when processing a PDF stream with `/Filter /LZWDecode` and a `/DecodeParms` dictionary that does not contain the `EarlyChange` key. This causes an access violation (0xC0000005) and crashes the process.

## Affected Version

muhammara <= 6.0.4 (latest)

## Vulnerability Details

**File:** `src/deps/PDFWriter/PDFParser.cpp` line 2107

```cpp
if (inDecodeParams)
{
    PDFObjectCastPtr<PDFInteger> earlyObj(
        QueryDictionaryObject(inDecodeParams, "EarlyChange")
    );
    early = earlyObj->GetValue();  // NULL dereference when EarlyChange key is absent
}
```

When `inDecodeParams` is non-NULL but lacks the `EarlyChange` key:
1. `QueryDictionaryObject()` returns NULL
2. `PDFObjectCastPtr<PDFInteger>(NULL)` wraps NULL
3. `earlyObj->GetValue()` dereferences NULL → crash

## PoC

460-byte malicious PDF triggers crash via `startReadingFromStream()`:

- PDF contains `/Filter /LZWDecode` with `/DecodeParms << >>` (empty, no EarlyChange)
- Exit code: `0xC0000005` (Access Violation)

## Fix

```cpp
if (earlyObj)
    early = earlyObj->GetValue();
```

## Impact

Any application accepting untrusted PDFs and using muhammara to read stream contents is vulnerable to DoS.

Similar to: CVE-2022-41957, CVE-2022-39381

## PoC File
[poc_muhammara_lzw_null.js](https://github.com/user-attachments/files/27186113/poc_muhammara_lzw_null.js)", "ghsa_id": "GHSA-fhp4-pr5j-46m5", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-06-26T20:55:18Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-fhp4-pr5j-46m5", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-fhp4-pr5j-46m5"}], "nvd_published_at": null, "published_at": "2026-06-26T20:55:18Z", "references": ["https://github.com/julianhille/MuhammaraJS/security/advisories/GHSA-fhp4-pr5j-46m5", "https://github.com/julianhille/MuhammaraJS/commit/a98c07780241353334eb65bfca1df025f14be70b", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-fhp4-pr5j-46m5"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/julianhille/MuhammaraJS/security-advisories/GHSA-fhp4-pr5j-46m5", "severity": "high", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/julianhille/MuhammaraJS", "summary": "Muhammara has a NULL pointer dereference in LZWDecode filter when DecodeParms omits EarlyChange key", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-06-26T20:55:19Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-fhp4-pr5j-46m5", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "6.0.5", "package": {"ecosystem": "npm", "name": "muhammara"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "<= 6.0.4"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: Muhammara has a NULL pointer dereference in LZWDecode filter when DecodeParms omits EarlyChange key
